text: 2026-06-09: CLAUDE.md updated after GCS biosample/expression promotion; final GCS validation had total_dangling_edges=0 and audit showed 8 node files / 23 edge files.
Next KG slice selected: OpenTargets disease_phenotype. It is smaller and safer than variants/enhancers, strengthens an existing relation, and now has ID normalization/stub tests before scratch merge.

2026-06-09: disease_phenotype slice promoted to gs://jouvencekb/kg/v2. GCS validate PASS with total_dangling_edges=0; audit remains 8/15 node files and 23/77 edge files, totals 3,203,188 nodes and 25,030,503 edges.
Final TxGNN model smoke test constraint recorded in CLAUDE.md: run on VPS with at most 2 CPU / 4G RAM, tiny model, local/scratch data only, no production GCS mutation.
Next Ralph cycle: pharmacogenomics. Patch adds mutation/molecule endpoint stubs so mutation_affects_molecule_response can be validated without full variant ingest.

2026-06-09: pharmacogenomics slice promoted to GCS. Added 2,429 mutation nodes and 4,866 mutation_affects_molecule_response edges; final validate PASS with total_dangling_edges=0; audit 9/15 nodes and 24/77 edges.

2026-06-09: drug_molecule slice promoted to GCS. Enriched nodes/molecule.parquet with 22,230 OpenTargets ChEMBL records and 19,100 DrugBank IDs; final validate PASS with total_dangling_edges=0; totals unchanged at 3,205,619 nodes and 25,035,369 edges.

2026-06-09: target+GO slice found OT 26.03 schema drift: go term names are label, not name. Code/test fixed, but full scratch ingest remains CPU-bound/too slow and was stopped before validation/promotion. No GCS target+GO promotion.

2026-06-09: target+GO slice promoted to GCS after optimizing no-evidence dedup_edges. Added OpenTargets 26.03 target IDs and GO term/pathway_contains_gene merge; final validate PASS with 3,233,849 nodes, 25,325,918 edges, total_dangling_edges=0.

2026-06-09: after target+GO merge, selected protein endpoint conflation as next Ralph task. Existing protein-named GCS edge files use gene endpoints; interaction/MoA should not be blindly ingested until this is documented/resolved.

Ralph operating rule from Jérémie, 2026-06-09: the TxGNN Ralph chantier is to finish unfinished CLAUDE.md tasks. Do not release/stop just because one subtask blocks; each turn must advance a new unfinished CLAUDE.md task until the CLAUDE.md goal is done.

2026-06-09: protein endpoint audit completed. All current GCS protein-named edge files physically validate through gene endpoints; CLAUDE.md now documents this as legacy gene/protein conflation. Next unfinished task is planning nodes/protein export/remapping before interaction/MoA.

2026-06-09 decision from Jérémie: TxGNN protein node IDs should be Ensembl Protein IDs (ENSP...), not UniProt. Update CLAUDE.md/kg_schema accordingly and use ENSP for future nodes/protein.parquet exports/remapping.

2026-06-09: ENSP protein node export promoted to GCS. nodes/protein.parquet has 233,995 Ensembl Protein IDs from OpenTargets target transcripts; final validate PASS with 3,467,844 nodes, 25,325,918 edges, total_dangling_edges=0.

2026-06-09: ENSP edge remapping audit shows blind remapping of legacy protein-named edges is unsafe. Most endpoints are NCBI and many genes have multiple ENSP translations; proceed first with gene_encodes_protein ENSG→ENSP edges.
2026-06-09: gene_encodes_protein promoted to GCS. Added 233,995 ENSG→ENSP edges; final validate PASS with 10 node types, 25 edge types, 3,467,844 nodes, 25,559,913 edges, total_dangling_edges=0.

2026-06-09 Ralph ops rule: keep TxGNN Ralph/team leases long enough for the work window (tonight-scale, not 30 min) and minimize pending time; target high active/claimed uptime, around 80%, by claiming the next unfinished CLAUDE.md task promptly.

2026-06-09: transcript export promoted to GCS. Added 507,365 ENST transcript nodes, 507,365 gene_has_transcript edges, and 233,995 transcript_encodes_protein edges; final validate PASS with 3,975,209 nodes, 26,301,273 edges, total_dangling_edges=0.

2026-06-09: OT 26.03 variant staged locally (3.2G, 7.43M rows). One-file smoke showed full mutation_in_gene and mutation_affects_transcript are extremely dense (11.65M edges each from one 311k-row parquet, 6.5G RSS), so Ralph must not blindly promote full variant gene/transcript edges. Safe next slice is mutation_causes_protein_change mapped to ENSP via unambiguous UniProt xrefs.

2026-06-10: Completion means clean Parquet promoted to canonical/versioned GCS with zero dangling edges plus corresponding node IDs in LaminDB/bionty/custom registries. TxGNN protein nodes are ENSP translation products in custom lnschema_txgnn.Protein; uniprot_id is xref only. Non-bionty entities use lnschema_txgnn.<OBJECT>.

2026-06-10 bounded OMX cycle: lnschema_txgnn.Protein live and 233,995 ENSP proteins synced; 2,588,052 mutation records synced; promoted nodes/mutation, mutation_causes_protein_change, mutation_associated_gene to gs://jouvencekb/kg/v2; streaming validate PASS 6,562,289 nodes, 27,014,101 edges, total_dangling_edges=0. Remaining blockers: EFO disease normalization for mutation_associated_disease, Paper registry sync, broader missing schema coverage.

2026-06-11 storage cleanup pass: migrated /home/ubuntu/data/txgnn-agent-reports to .omoc/reports/legacy-agent-reports with matching sha256 manifests and removed the source. Archived and checksum/size-verified txgnn-bounded-promotion-staging, txgnn-drug-molecule-scratch, txgnn-known-variants-scratch, and txgnn-gwas-join-scratch under /mnt/gcs/jouvencekb/kg/local-archive/home-ubuntu-data-txgnn-20260611T0907Z, rewrote the GWAS archive symlink to archive-internal relative, then removed those four local directories. Remaining local TxGNN dirs: txgnn-literature, txgnn-opentargets-phase5, txgnn-ot-phase45, txgnn-phase4-audit, txgnn-target-go-scratch, txgnn-variant-combined-scratch, txgnn-variant-gwas-promotion-scratch, txgnn-variants-scratch. Literature GCS FUSE archive attempt was stopped and partial copy removed.

2026-06-11 storage cleanup continuation: archived remaining TxGNN /home/ubuntu/data directories as deterministic .tar.zst files under /mnt/gcs/jouvencekb/kg/local-archive/home-ubuntu-data-txgnn-20260611T0940Z with manifest.tsv, sha256sum, and zstd -t verification; removed txgnn-opentargets-phase5, txgnn-variant-combined-scratch, txgnn-target-go-scratch, txgnn-variant-gwas-promotion-scratch, txgnn-phase4-audit, txgnn-ot-phase45, txgnn-variants-scratch, and txgnn-literature. find /home/ubuntu/data -maxdepth 1 -type d -name txgnn* now returns no project data directories. Updated CLAUDE.md, docs/kg_lamindb_blockers.md, docs/storage_cleanup.md, and active OMOC prompts away from removed local scratch paths.

2026-06-11 LaminDB cloud path/parity pass: patched sync_parquet_nodes_to_lamindb to avoid stale ln.connect hub refresh for already-current jkobject/jouvencekb and to represent gnomAD-like mutation node IDs; canonical /mnt/gcs/jouvencekb/kg/v2 parity now has missing_ids=0 for paper, mutation, and protein after creating 30,851 Paper records and 1,456 Mutation records.

2026-06-11 disease registry policy pass: deployed lnschema_txgnn migration 0005_custom_disease, switched disease sync/parity to custom lnschema_txgnn.Disease keyed by normalized source ontology ID, synced canonical /mnt/gcs/jouvencekb/kg/v2 disease nodes (write created 38,323, existing 9,865 during batched run; follow-up dry-run existing=48,188, would_create=0), and verified canonical disease parity missing_ids=0. mutation_associated_disease is now unblocked on registry policy; next task is scratch-first edge promotion/zero-dangling validation.

summary: Promoted canonical mutation_associated_disease union from archived known-variant and GWAS scratch; disease nodes 48291->52889, edge rows 4656171, targeted endpoint validation missing_mutations=0 missing_diseases=0, disease sync created 3536 custom records, parity missing_ids=0 for disease and mutation; full streaming validator timed out after 20m with no output.

text: Added node ontology namespace coverage audit CLI and ran it on /mnt/gcs/jouvencekb/kg/v2. Report .omoc/reports/node-ontology-coverage-20260611T112539Z.json counted 6,566,887 node rows across 11/15 node files, missing organism/cell_line/dataset/enhancer, and exposed underscore-form ontology IDs in canonical disease/cell_type nodes requiring scratch-first normalization before schema completion.

2026-06-11 ontology separator normalization: scratch-first normalized canonical disease/cell_type node IDs and all selected endpoint columns from underscore ontology syntax to CURIE syntax under /mnt/gcs/jouvencekb/kg/scratch/ontology-id-normalization-20260611T113134Z, backed up pre-normalization files under /mnt/gcs/jouvencekb/kg/local-archive/canonical-v2-pre-ontology-id-normalization-20260611T113134Z, promoted 12 affected Parquets to /mnt/gcs/jouvencekb/kg/v2, and verified targeted canonical validation missing_selected_endpoints=0 underscore_selected_endpoints=0 plus disease LaminDB parity missing_ids=0. Disease node rows now 41,859 after collapsing 11,030 duplicate normalized IDs; coverage is 11/15 node files, 30/77 edge files, 6,555,857 nodes, 31,670,272 edges.

2026-06-11 human organism slice: promoted nodes/organism.parquet (NCBITaxon:9606), organism_has_gene (109,325 rows), and organism_has_tissue (16,061 rows) to /mnt/gcs/jouvencekb/kg/v2 from scratch. Targeted canonical validation reports missing_x=0 missing_y=0 bad_type_or_relation_rows=0 for both new edges; bionty.Organism parity missing_ids=0. Coverage is now 12/15 node files, 32/77 edge files, 6,555,858 nodes, 31,795,658 edges. Full parity audit still shows remaining gaps for transcript/gene/molecule/pathway/tissue/cell_type; OMOC task 26 tracks that blocker before final smoke.

summary: Synced canonical transcript nodes into lnschema_txgnn.Transcript; transcript parity missing_ids=0. Public bionty/pertdb writes for remaining gene/molecule/pathway/tissue/cell_type gaps are blocked because write paths resolve by symbol/name and mutate existing IDs instead of exact KG IDs; sync now fail-closes those --write paths pending exact-ID registry policy.

text: 2026-06-11 systemd Ralph loop verification: txgnn-ralph-loop.timer is enabled/active, service runs .omoc/bin/txgnn-ralph-loop.sh from the TxGNN repo, GCS mount gate is present, and a direct second invocation exits with "another tick is already running" via flock -n on .omoc/txgnn-ralph-loop.lock. Documented in docs/ralph_systemd_loop.md.

2026-06-11 true Jérémie blocker recorded in OMOC task 27: remaining canonical parity gaps gene=30,604, molecule=21,672, pathway=1,566, tissue=291, cell_type=76 require exact-ID policy before final smoke. Marked task 27 failed as the CLI blocker state and updated txgnn-ralph-loop.sh to stop when no pending/in_progress/blocked tasks remain, even if failed blocker records are present.
